entities.iron: a hot iron with steam rising

scenes.title: The Laundry Room
scenes.background_prompt: A small laundry room with a washing machine, an ironing board set up, a basket of clothes, and a shelf with detergent bottles. Bright indoor lighting. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A small bright laundry room. A woman in a gray t-shirt and her hair in a messy bun stands at an ironing board, pressing a light blue dress shirt. A hot iron in her right hand releases a thick burst of white steam as it glides across the fabric, the steam rising and catching the overhead light. A laundry basket filled with neatly folded clothes — towels, t-shirts, a pair of jeans — sits on the floor beside her. A white washing machine hums quietly against the wall. A shelf above holds bottles of detergent, a box of dryer sheets, and a small potted succulent. A clothesline with wooden pegs stretches across one corner of the room with a few socks hanging from it.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place woman at the ironing board, standing and pressing a light blue dress shirt with a hot iron. The iron releases a thick burst of white steam.
scenes.scene_description: On the far left, a large window with a rounded brown wooden frame is set into a pale green wall. Through the window, a sunny outdoor scene is visible, featuring rolling green hills dotted with small white and pink flowers, two large leafy green trees, and a bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds. Moving right along the light brown wood-plank floor, a large, light blue front-loading washing machine stands against the wall. It features a circular glass door with a dark gray rim, three small control knobs, and a detergent drawer. To the right of the washing machine, a woman with brown hair tied in a ponytail stands behind a yellow wooden ironing board. She has a cheerful expression and is wearing a light blue long-sleeved sweater, a yellow apron with brown stains, brown pants, and brown shoes. The woman is using a brown and silver iron to press a light blue collared shirt. A large, billowing cloud of white steam rises from the iron toward the right. A green and brown striped cloth is draped over the left side of the ironing board. To the right of the ironing board on the floor sits a round, woven wicker laundry basket filled with orange, blue, and green clothes. Behind the woman, a brown wooden shelf is mounted on the green wall, holding a large green detergent bottle, a yellow box, and a blue spray bottle. The room has a thick brown wooden trim at the top of the walls and a brown baseboard. Centered on the cream-colored ceiling is a circular light fixture with a brown frame and a frosted glass dome.
